---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with a skill
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Skill Affected
Which skill has the issue? (e.g., pm-prd-scaffold, pm-success-metrics)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Invoke the skill with `/skill-name`
2. Answer question X with Y
3. Observe incorrect behavior

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Claude Code Version:** (run `claude --version`)
- **macOS Version:** (run `sw_vers`)
- **Skill Version:** (check SKILL.md frontmatter)

## Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant logs.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
